intended_use: MRCAT imaging is intended to provide the operator with information of tissue properties for radiation attenuation estimation purposes in photon external beam radiotherapy treatment planning.
intended_use_full: MRCAT imaging is intended to provide the operator with information of tissue properties for radiation attenuation estimation purposes in photon external beam radiotherapy treatment planning.
ground_truth: CT-based dose plans and registered CT images used for HU value calibration
other_metrics: Dose accuracy: simulated dose shall not differ in 95% of indicated patients (gamma analysis criterion 2%/2mm realized in 98% of voxels within PTV or exceeding 75% of maximum dose) when compared with CT-based plan. Average simulated dose shall not deviate more than 5% or 1 Gy (whichever is greater) in 99% of indicated patients in sensitive organ volumes. Geometric accuracy: ±1 mm accuracy in 200 mm diameter sphere; ±5 mm accuracy in 500 mm diameter sphere (limited in bore direction by ±160 mm from z=0 mm plane).
